parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

legend top right
  | Legend |
  |<#LightBlue> Control Plane ~ Master Node |
  |<#LightGreen> Worker Node |
  |<#LightGray> Power Manager System Setup |
  |<#White> Power Manager Configuration |
  |<#Orange> Power Manager Deployment |
endlegend

actor Georgina
participant "API-Server" as API #LightBlue
participant "etcd" as etcd #LightBlue
participant "Controller Manager" as CM #LightBlue
participant "Scheduler" as Sched #LightBlue
participant "Power Operator" as PO #LightBlue
participant "Kubelet" as Kubelet #LightGreen
participant "Power Node Agent" as PNA #LightGreen
participant "Power Optimization Library" as POL #LightGreen
participant "K8s Objects" as K8s #LightGreen
participant "Kube-Proxy" as KP #LightGreen

== Kubernetes Initialization ==
Georgina -> API : 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
API --> etcd : 2 save new state
etcd --> API : 3 check for changes
API -> Sched : 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
Sched -> API : 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
API -> CM : 6 assign pod to node
CM --> etcd : 7 save new state
etcd --> API : 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
API -> Kubelet : 9 bind pod to node
Kubelet -> PNA : 10 start container
PNA -> Kubelet : 11 update pod status
Kubelet --> etcd : 12 save new state

== Power Manager Initialization ==
Georgina -> KP : 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
Georgina -> Kubelet : 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
note right of Kubelet #LightGray: cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
Georgina -> Kubelet : 3 Reserve System CPUs
note right of Kubelet #LightGray: reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
Kubelet -> PNA : 4 Create Namespace
note right of PNA #White: apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
Kubelet -> PNA : 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
note right of PNA #White: apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
Kubelet -> K8s : 6 Create CRDs
note right of K8s #White: make
Kubelet -> PNA : 7 Label nodes
note right of PNA #White: label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"

== Power Manager Deployment ==
Kubelet -> PNA : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA #Orange: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
Kubelet -> POL : 2 Deploy the config
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
POL -> POL : 3 Set Shared Profile
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
POL -> POL : 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
POL -> POL : 5 Deploy Pod
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-pod.yaml

== Power Manager additional functionality ==
=== Uncore ===
Georgina -> Kubelet : 1 Confirm Kernel version
note right of Kubelet #LightGray: kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
Kubelet -> POL : 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-uncore
Kubelet -> PNA : 3 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA #Orange: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
Kubelet -> POL : 4 Deploy the config
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
POL -> POL : 5 Set Shared Profile
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
POL -> POL : 6 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
POL -> POL : 7 Deploy Pod
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-pod.yaml
POL -> POL : 8 Set Time of Day functionality
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-timeofday

=== P-State ===
Kubelet -> PNA : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA #Orange: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
Kubelet -> POL : 2 Deploy the config
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
POL -> POL : 3 Set Shared Profile\nand configure the P-State governor
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
POL -> POL : 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
POL -> POL : 5 Deploy Pod
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-pod.yaml

=== C-State ===
Kubelet -> PNA : Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA #Orange: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
Kubelet -> POL : Deploy the config
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
POL -> POL : Set Shared Profile
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
POL -> POL : Deploy th Workload
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
POL -> POL : Deploy Pod
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-pod.yaml
POL -> POL : Set C-State functionality
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-cstates

=== Time of Day ===
Kubelet -> PNA : Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA #Orange: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
Kubelet -> POL : Deploy the config
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
POL -> POL : Set Shared Profile
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
POL -> POL : Deploy th Workload
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
POL -> POL : Deploy Pod
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-pod.yaml
POL -> POL : Set Time of Day functionality
note right of POL #Orange: examples/example-timeofday

@enduml
```
